name: Andrea Musso
title: Senior Web Developer
bio: I'm a web developer with a passion for both front-end and back-end development. I started my career back in 2015 and since then, I've worn many hats: freelancer, team collaborator, and agency developer. Each role has shaped how I approach web development today with flexibility, creativity, and a focus on quality. These days, I’m building custom websites at FDRY, collaborating with awesome clients and creative teams from all over the world.
whatIBuild: My work sits mostly in e-commerce and content-driven builds. I develop Shopify and WooCommerce stores with custom themes and tailored functionality, and I also build bespoke websites from WordPress custom themes to headless setups when the project needs more flexibility on the front end. I'm comfortable working end-to-end, from UI implementation and component systems to back-end logic, integrations, and CMS architecture.
outsideOfWork: When I'm not building websites, I'm usually outside. I love hiking, and my favourite obsession is mushroom picking in the mountains, slow walks through the forest, paying attention to tiny details, and enjoying that real contact with nature. It's the best reset I know.
